name: @samuelbines/nunchucks
description: A powerful templating engine with inheritance, asynchronous control, and more (jinja2 inspired)
author: Samuel Bines <samuelbines@gmail.com>

scripts.lint: echo "lint not configured for wasm-only package"
scripts.vitest:browser: echo "vitest browser removed; use go wasm runtime"
scripts.test:ts: echo "ts engine removed; runtime is go wasm"
scripts.test:smoke: echo "smoke test removed; runtime is go wasm"
scripts.prepare:input: echo "prepare input removed; runtime is go wasm"
scripts.test:browser: echo "browser tests removed; use go wasm runtime tests"
scripts.update-package: pnpm build && pnpm pack && pnpm version patch && pnpm publish --access public
